# query

**Instance Property**

A [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Query] dictionary containing the criteria for matching records in the database.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute CloudKit.Query query;
```

## Accessing Response Properties

- **moreComing**: A Boolean value that indicates whether there are more records to fetch.
